narrative:
Circleville 3-B (precinct in Pickaway County) has 774 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
